description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:18-alpine Docker image and include the Security/SAST and Code-Quality templates. Define a single test stage. Add a pages job that runs in the test stage, caches the node_modules/ directory, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. The pages job executes the shell commands: npm i hexo-cli -g, test -e package.json && npm install, node server/index.js, and hexo deploy, then deploys to GitLab Pages. Also include the SAST job from the template, which runs in the test stage using the same image.
